postconditions: result == (target_len >= 1 && target_len <= MAX_PRINCIPAL_LEN && target_non_anonymous == 1 && method_len >= 1 && method_len <= MAX_QUERY_METHOD_LEN && method_ascii == 1)
acceptance_criteria: Accept allowlist entries only for bounded non-anonymous targets and bounded ASCII method names.

test_evidence.test_name: gateway allowlist validation uses verified model for target and method boundaries
